creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Sep 10, 2012 at 11:57:15AM +0100, Simon L. B. Nielsen wrote:
> [Retry with correct GNATS address]
> 
> Hey,
> 
> I wonder if the better fix isn't just to call 'pkg audit' instead
> (from portaudit)? I haven't looked at the code, but I would assume
> that would be much simpler, and it's the correct long term way to go
> compared to the horrible portaudit.sh code...

And if it is not, it needs to be fixed :D

regards,
Bapt
